introSection: Iron Menace is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2024, it is a custom Dive Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was announced on August 10, 2023. Vertical construction began in November 2023.

Installation of the track was completed in February 2024.

Iron Menace opened on May 10, 2024.

fullText:
Iron Menace is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2024, it is a custom Dive Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard.

The coaster was announced on August 10, 2023. Vertical construction began in November 2023.

Installation of the track was completed in February 2024.

Iron Menace opened on May 10, 2024.
